tagline: Track every step — from the ankle up.

contact.hours_pst: Monday–Friday 9:00 AM–6:00 PM PST; Saturday–Sunday 10:00 AM–4:00 PM PST
contact.response_time: We aim to reply to email within one business day.

location.headquarters: StrikeFitness is headquartered at 123 Fitness Way, San Francisco, CA 94102. Fulfillment ships from a West Coast US distribution center.
location.regions_served: United States only (all 50 states). We do not ship internationally.
location.retail_stores: Online only — no physical retail stores.

services.order_support: Order status, changes before shipment, returns, and exchanges — contact us by email or phone during business hours with your order number.
services.shipping: Zone-based flat rates by the first digit of your US ZIP code, plus a weight surcharge for orders over one pound. Exact tiers and discount rules are listed in the product catalog knowledge (shipping & discount sections).
services.warranty: Limited warranty against manufacturing defects on hardware. Contact support with your order number and photos if something arrives damaged or defective.
services.bulk_and_education: For bulk or education pricing, email sales@strikefitness.com with details.
services.accessibility: For help using the store or large-text requests, contact support@strikefitness.com.

payment.accepted: Major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), Apple Pay, Google Pay where shown at checkout.
payment.tax: Sales tax is estimated at checkout using your shipping ZIP code (simulated rates for demo).

policies_summary.returns_unopened: 30 days from delivery for refund to original payment when unopened and in resellable condition.
policies_summary.returns_opened: Defective items: exchange or store credit within 14 days of delivery with support approval. Non-defective opened items handled case-by-case.
policies_summary.privacy: We use order and contact information to fulfill orders and respond to support. We do not sell your personal information.
